CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str String);
SELECT ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(str) AS hashes, id FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE str LIKE '%Click%');
SELECT id, ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(str) AS hashes FROM test_strings GROUP BY id ORDER BY id;

WITH (SELECT ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(str) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) AS min_hashes SELECT ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(str) FROM test_strings WHERE ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(str) = min_hashes;
SELECT t1.id, ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(t1.str) AS min_hash, ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(t2.str) AS max_hash FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id != t2.id;
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT id, ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(str) AS hashes FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_results SELECT id, ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(str) FROM test_strings WHERE id < 3;
